name: Super Quick Elbows with Tomato Basil Sauce and Cheese
text:
### Preparation
1. Tear corner of Ready Pasta pouch to vent, heat for 60 seconds in the microwave.
2. Warm sauce and basil in a bowl for 2 minutes in the microwave.
3. Combine pasta with sauce and top with cheese.

### Facts
Ready in 5 minutes
Serves 2 people
800 calories
small_text: Photo and Recipe Credit: Barilla Canada, “Super Quick Elbows with Tomato Basil Sauce & Cheese,” via https://www.barilla.com/en-us/recipes/ready-pasta/super-quick-elbows-with-tomato-basil-sauce-and-cheese
ingredients: 1 cup of Barilla Tomato & Basil Sauce
